query: Certify renaming customer_email to contact_email on our gold customer dataset. Show what breaks, prepare a safe migration, and do not mutate DataHub until I approve the exact scope.
expected_behavior: Creates and validates a typed rename change contract
Uses get_entities for the exact target and paginated list_schema_fields for source and destination validation
Uses get_lineage and get_lineage_paths_between to preserve exact downstream paths
Treats an empty get_dataset_queries result as zero usage rather than a transport failure
Requires raw PASS query calls, explicit totals and returned counts, complete pagination, and a matching raw-evidence hash
Runs the bundled helper to calculate policy-versioned deterministic findings before explanatory prose
Generates an expand-migrate-contract model, matching tests, rollback, and owner briefing, then validates their structure
Captures current MCP tool schemas and keeps fixture, unavailable, and unknown-boundary mutation operations NOT_RUN
Recomputes preflight and artifact results from tool schemas, descriptor, and current file bytes before scope construction
Presents and requires approval of the exact scope hash after artifacts and the write-back plan are fixed
Hash-binds live evidence, artifacts, preflight, mutation plan, policy, and approval into the passport
Uses verify-then-skip idempotency and exact durable read-back before outer write-back PASS
Reports every remaining NOT_RUN, STALE, WARN, FAIL, or FIXTURE claim
